title: Beneath The Storm

sections.label: Spoken
lines: Shield me, O Light, from the weight of the dark.

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: They rise with venom, their hearts unclean,
Hands full of harm, their whispers keen.
Traps in the shadows, pits for my fall,
But You are the strength that answers the call.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: Hold not their flame against me,
Let their snares be their chains.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Lift me higher, above the flood,
Where mercy rains, where hearts ignite.
Strike the steel of my unyielding blood,
With every cry, turn shadow to light.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Their lies like arrows pierce the air,
A storm of chaos, cruel and unfair.
But within my chest, a fire grows,
The spark of justice, the storm it knows.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: Turn their venom to dust,
Break the fangs of deceit.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Lift me higher, above the flood,
Where mercy rains, where hearts ignite.
Strike the steel of my unyielding blood,
With every cry, turn shadow to light.

sections.label: Bridge
lines: (**electric guitar solo over cinematic progression**)

sections.label: Spoken
lines: Shields surround me; their flames now cold.
In the ashes, the pure shall unfold.

epigraph: that they rise not up again
